content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt calls this build a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), while description.txt has no beta language.
Pierre: Apple's App Store is meant for finished, reviewed builds — release notes explicitly describing the app as a "public beta" with unfinished sync features may prompt reviewers to reject or ask for clarification under 2.2, since it signals the app isn't ready for general release. The description itself looks fine, so this is likely just leftover TestFlight-style copy pasted into the App Store release notes. Fix: rewrite release_notes.txt to describe this version's actual changes without "beta"/"testing"/"rough edges" language.
